description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every pull request and push to the main branch. The workflow should have two jobs, one for macOS and one for Linux, each with a matrix strategy to test different environments. For macOS, set up Python 3.9, install packages and modules, and compile the code. For Linux, use a container with a specific image, install dependencies, compile the code, run tests, and publish coverage to Codecov.
